data.label: PuerTS
data.description: PuerTS 是 Unity/Unreal/Dotnet 下的 TypeScript 编程解决方案，提供了一个 JavaScript 运行时，并提供 TypeScript 声明文件生成能力，易于通过 TypeScript 访问宿主引擎。

data.label: PuerTS
data.description: PuerTS is a TypeScript programming solution for Unity/Unreal/Dotnet. It provides a JavaScript runtime and TypeScript declaration file generation capabilities, enabling easy access to the host engine via TypeScript.
